center.name: Pangolakha Wildlife Sanctuary
center.summary: Pangolakha Wildlife Sanctuary是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括长尾阔嘴鸟、紫啸鸫，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: temminckii from Pangolakha Wildlife Sanctuary, Sikkim | status = LC | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | genus = Myophonus | species = caeruleus | authority = (Scopoli, 1786) | synonyms = }} The blue whistling thrush (Myophonus caeruleus) is a bird in the Old World flycatchers family Muscicapidae that is found in the mountains of Central Asia, South Asia, China and Southeast Asia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The long-tailed broadbill (Psarisomus dalhousiae) is a species of bird that is found in the Himalayas, extending east through Northeastern India to Southeast Asia
